message:
chore(hook): silence dead-code lint on extract_project_name shim + note retention intent

The thin `extract_project_name()` shim that delegates to
`extract_project_name_with_policy(&PathTopologyPolicy::default())` is only
reachable through unit tests right now. Every production call site has
been migrated to pass an explicit `PathTopologyPolicy` so error messages
cite the configured project roots.

Rather than deleting the shim (which would silently change unit-test
imports and lose the document-by-example of what a default-policy call
looks like), this commit:

  * Adds `#[allow(dead_code)]` so the clippy/rustc dead-code lint no
    longer fires under workspace CI with `-D warnings`.
  * Extends the docstring to state explicitly that the shim is retained
    for test coverage and for callers that provably operate under the
    default topology — preventing the next maintainer from deleting it
    on a good-faith cleanup sweep.

No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
